items.raw_desc: Klórozó CF GROUP Salinator SSCmini Salt Chlorinator 20g/h:The SSCmini Salt Chlorinator is designed for disinfection of water in indoor and outdoor swimming pools with a volume up to 90 m³. It uses the process of electrolysis, which breaks down salt to produce chlorine, effectively disinfecting the water without the need to add additional chemicals. This process is health and skin friendly, so even allergy sufferers and children can bathe in the pool without any worries. Another advantage is that the treated water does not have the typical chlorine smell. The plant consists of an electrolytic cell and a separate control unit which controls the operation of the plant and regulates the operating time by means of a microprocessor. The disinfection process itself is then ensured by an electrolytic cell with a self-cleaning function, which prevents scale build-up on the electrodes.
